title: About Us
subtitle: What is Readya?
description: Readya is a modern Georgian platform that transforms written text into an audio experience.
extra: Into a listenable format — for studying, working, or simply consuming information with ease.
audience_title: Our platform is designed for everyone, but especially helps:
audience: Those who get tired quickly while reading
benefits: Feel calm and free — read with your ears.
cta: Readya.me — the smarter way to read.
